empty_bucket_explanations.anomaly_type_mismatch: no examples observed under the deterministic rule
empty_bucket_explanations.highest_confidence_false_positive: no examples observed under the deterministic rule

failure_selection.selection_rule: Deterministic failure triage: highest-confidence false positives, highest-confidence false negatives, anomaly type mismatches, then lowest frame mIoU; ties sort by frame_id.
